info.name: 01 - Auth
info.description: Authentication, OTP, password recovery, password management, and auth security tests. OTP and reset tokens are delivered through Mailtrap and must be copied manually into environment variables.

item.name: Citizen Register Flow
item.description: Register creates a citizen and sends OTP to Mailtrap. Copy the OTP from Mailtrap into citizen_otp before verifying.

request.description: Purpose: create a citizen account. Required role: public. Expected response: user_id and requires_otp=true. OTP is emailed through Mailtrap and is never returned.
Purpose: verify registration OTP. Required role: public. Manually set citizen_otp from Mailtrap first. Expected response: Bearer token and user.
Purpose: return the authenticated citizen profile. Required token: citizen_token. Expected response: current user.

exec: pm.test('success key exists', function () { const json = pm.response.json(); pm.expect(json).to.have.property('success'); });

request.description: Purpose: revoke current citizen token only. Required token: citizen_token. Expected response: success=true.

exec: pm.test('success key exists', function () { const json = pm.response.json(); pm.expect(json).to.have.property('success'); });

item.name: Login Flow
item.description: Login validates credentials first, then sends OTP to Mailtrap. Copy the OTP into the matching environment variable before verification.

request.description: Purpose: citizen login. Required role: public. Expected response: user_id and requires_otp=true. Open Mailtrap, copy OTP into citizen_otp, then verify.
Purpose: verify citizen login OTP. Required role: public. Manually set citizen_otp from Mailtrap. Expected response: citizen token.
Purpose: admin login using seeded account. Copy OTP from Mailtrap into admin_otp. Expected response: user_id and requires_otp=true.
Purpose: verify admin login OTP. Required role: public. Manually set admin_otp from Mailtrap. Expected response: admin token.
Purpose: employee login using seeded account. Copy OTP from Mailtrap into employee_otp. Expected response: user_id and requires_otp=true.
Purpose: verify employee login OTP. Required role: public. Manually set employee_otp from Mailtrap. Expected response: employee token.

item.name: Password Recovery
item.description: Forgot password sends a reset token email through Mailtrap. Copy the token into reset_token before reset.

request.description: Purpose: request password reset. Required role: public. Expected response is generic even if email does not exist. Open Mailtrap and copy reset token into reset_token.

exec: pm.test('success key exists', function () { const json = pm.response.json(); pm.expect(json).to.have.property('success'); });

request.description: Purpose: reset password with Mailtrap token. Required role: public. Required variables: reset_token and new_password. Expected response: success=true, no auto-login.

exec: pm.test('success key exists', function () { const json = pm.response.json(); pm.expect(json).to.have.property('success'); });

request.description: Purpose: change password. Required token: citizen_token. Body needs current_password, new password, and confirmation. Expected response: revokes other tokens.

exec: pm.test('success key exists', function () { const json = pm.response.json(); pm.expect(json).to.have.property('success'); });

request.description: Purpose: revoke only current token. Required token: citizen_token.

exec: pm.test('success key exists', function () { const json = pm.response.json(); pm.expect(json).to.have.property('success'); });

request.description: Purpose: revoke all tokens for current user. Required token: citizen_token.

exec: pm.test('success key exists', function () { const json = pm.response.json(); pm.expect(json).to.have.property('success'); });

item.name: Security Tests
item.description: Negative checks for authentication and RBAC.

request.description: Purpose: confirm invalid credentials use a generic error. Required role: public. Expected response: 401 success=false.
Purpose: confirm wrong OTP fails and increments attempts. Required role: public. Expected response: 422 success=false.
Purpose: confirm protected profile requires auth. Required token: none. Expected response: 401.
Purpose: confirm RBAC. Required token: citizen_token. Expected response: 403.
